name: Samoosas Chicken Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and fillet the chicken breasts.
2. Mix together garlic, ginger, and chopped chili.
3. Rub the mixture into the chicken fillets.
4. Steam the chicken for about 15 minutes over medium heat.
5. Flake the cooked chicken and combine with the remaining ingredients.
6. Allow the mixture to cool before filling samoosas.
7. Fills approximately 36 samoosas.
